name: Sweetheart Cookie Puzzle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Lightly spray two baking sheets with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, sugar, and vanilla.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine oats and flour.
5. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Divide dough in half.
7. Pat each half of dough into heart shape about 1/4 inch (0.25 inches) thick on prepared baking sheets.
8. To decorate, gently press M&Ms into dough in a pattern or phrase of your choice.
9. With a sharp knife, cut through dough to form 10 random shapes.
10. Do not separate the pieces.
11. Bake for 18 minutes or until lightly browned.
12. Carefully cut through pieces again to separate them.
13. Cool for 5 minutes on baking sheets.
14. Remove and cool completely on wire racks.
